name_en: MuCEM - Musée des Civilisations de l'Europe et de la Méditerranée

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum entrance is
phrases.text_local: Où est l'entrée du musée, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lahn-TRAY doo moo-ZAY, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The main entrance is on the ground level. The upper terrace connects to the Saint-Jean fort — both levels are worth visiting.

responses.english: The main entrance is on the ground floor, sea side.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: L'entrée principale est au rez-de-chaussée, côté mer.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the rooftop exhibition space
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une exposition sur la terrasse ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon eks-poh-zee-SYON soor lah teh-RAS
phrases.cultural_note: The rooftop offers stunning views over the Mediterranean and the Fort Saint-Jean. The J4 gallery building, designed by Rudy Ricciotti, is iconic.

responses.english: Yes, on the upper level. Take the stairs.
responses.phonetic: wee, les-PASS deks-poh-zee-SYON sur luh twah eh oh nee-VOH soo-payr-YUHR
responses.local: Oui, au niveau supérieur. Prenez l'escalier.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum ticket includes Fort Saint-Jean
phrases.text_local: Le billet comprend-il l'accès au Fort Saint-Jean ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh bee-YAY kom-PRAHN-TEEL lah-SAY oh FOR san-ZHAN
phrases.cultural_note: A combined ticket (€12) gives access to both the MuCEM exhibitions and the historic Fort Saint-Jean across the bridge.

responses.english: Yes, it's included in the combined ticket. Ask at the ticket office.
responses.local: Oui, c'est inclus dans le billet combiné. Demandez au guichet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an audio guide
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are available in several languages at most major French museums.

responses.english: Yes, in several languages. Ask at the reception.
responses.phonetic: wee, ahn ploo-ZYUR LAHNG. duh-mahn-DAY ah lah-KOY
responses.local: Oui, en plusieurs langues. Demandez à l'accueil.
